features: Rebuilt Client Messages page to use the same premium layout as Guard messages
Client now gets Dispatch Inbox, conversation stream, compose box, quick replies, and right detail rail
Added local Dispatch / Client thread storage for development testing
Client can send messages to Dispatch channel from the Messages page
Quick response buttons work for client messaging
Right rail links to active patrol request/property, recent alerts, and recent reports
Preserved v3.0.36 Reports page and previous badge/cache fixes
